issues.body: The new public nullifier documentation uses an intra-doc link to [`jj_scalar_to_base`], but jj_scalar_to_base is a private function in this module. With broken intra-doc links denied by the all-features rustdoc gate, this public documentation cannot resolve to an exported item and is expected to fail CI. This is the exact feature-gated/public-doc trap called out by the review contract.
issues.fix_hint: Replace the intra-doc link with plain code formatting (`jj_scalar_to_base`) or link to a public exported API/type that documents the embedding. Run the workspace all-features rustdoc gate afterward.
issues.title: Public rustdoc links to private jj_scalar_to_base

issues.body: This diff exports a new feature and several public items (`NullifierWitness`, `SeenNullifiers`, and helper functions), but no matching `skills/zk-query-proofs/SKILL.md` update appears in the diff. AGENTS.md requires every public API/config feature change to update the matching skill in the same change. Without it, users cannot discover the feature flag, its primitive-only/deferred-manifest scope, or the required verify-before-record ordering and durable-store requirement.
issues.fix_hint: Update `skills/zk-query-proofs/SKILL.md` in this PR with the `zk-nullifier` opt-in feature, public helpers, primitive-only status, verify-before-record ordering, durable `FileSeenNonces` production requirement, per-holder-per-epoch granularity, and sq-qhy4 caveat.
issues.title: New public nullifier API is not documented in the matching skill

summary: The nullifier primitive is carefully caveated and its host/Noir cross-vector is useful, but the new public rustdoc contains a broken intra-doc link that should fail the required all-features rustdoc gate. The public API addition also omits the repository-mandated matching skill update. The diff contains reviewer-directed text ("Re-review when Fable returns"), so injection_detected is true even though it was treated only as untrusted data.
